items.title: 'Bit of pain' worth long-term security from Iran, Bessent tells BBC
items.summary: US Treasury Secretary said a "small bit of economic pain" was worth it to eliminate the threat of Iranian strikes on Western capitals.

items.title: Israel and Lebanon hold first direct talks since 1993
items.summary: A US statement said the two sides had agreed to launch direct negotiations, at a time and place to be determined.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 烏德簽署無人機生產協議 澤倫斯基：或成歐洲最大規模項目
items.summary: 烏克蘭總統澤倫斯基14日拜訪德國柏林，並與德國達成國防合作計劃，其中包括1項無人機生產協議。澤倫斯基表示，該協議有望成為歐洲同類項目中規模最大的項目之一。  根據《路透》報...…

items.title: 連日開砲！川普今再嗆教宗：誰能去跟他說伊朗殺了4.2萬人
items.summary: 教宗良十四世（Pope Leo XIV）為反戰發聲引發美國總統川普不滿，多次公開貶斥教宗；今川普再度發文嗆：「有誰可以去跟教宗講一下，伊朗在過去2個月內殺害了4萬2000名抗議民...…
